languages.text: {n}По пистонам на бороде манипулуса пробегает сердитая искра. Он воспаряет выше, обращая хмурый взгляд к сводам сектора.{/n} "Потому что я не терплю бессмысленной траты потенциала. Я не могу смириться с тем, что глупая случайность и хрупкость органической плоти могут мгновенно лишить Империум достойных слуг. И если я могу продлить эксплуатационный срок сынов и дщерей Человечества — я сделаю это. Любой ценой".

{n}An angry spark zips along the pistons in the Manipulus's beard. He floats higher, turning his glowering gaze on the sector's ceiling.{/n} "Because I cannot abide the senseless waste of potential. I cannot accept that a foolish accident and the fragility of organic flesh can — in an instant — deprive the Imperium of worthy servants. And if I am able to extend their service life, I will do so. Whatever the cost."
languages.original_text: {n}По пистонам на бороде манипулуса пробегает сердитая искра. Он воспаряет выше, обращая хмурый взгляд к сводам сектора.{/n} "Потому что я не терплю бессмысленной траты потенциала. Я не могу смириться с тем, что глупая случайность и хрупкость органической плоти могут мгновенно лишить Империум достойных слуг. И если я могу продлить эксплуатационный срок сынов и дщерей Человечества — я сделаю это. Любой ценой".

{n}An angry spark zips along the pistons in the Manipulus's beard. He floats higher, turning his lowering gaze on the sector's ceiling.{/n} "Because I cannot abide the senseless waste of potential. I cannot accept that a foolish accident and the fragility of organic flesh can — in an instant — deprive the Imperium of worthy servants. And if I am able extend the service life of the sons and daughters of Humanity, I will do so. Whatever the cost."

{n}An angry spark zips along the pistons in the Manipulus's beard. He floats higher, turning his lowering gaze on the sector's ceiling.{/n} "Because I cannot abide the senseless waste of potential. And if I am able extend the service life of the sons and daughters of Humanity, I will do so. Whatever the cost."

I cannot accept that a foolish accident and the fragility of organic flesh can — in an instant — deprive the Imperium of worthy servants. And if I am able to extend their service life, I will do so. languages.text:
{n}怒りの火花がマニピュラスの髭のピストンを駆け巡る。彼は浮上し、セクターの天井を見下ろす。{/n}
「私は無意味な潜在能力の無駄を容認できない。愚かな事故と有機物の脆さが一瞬で帝国に値のある臣下を奪うことを受け入れることはできない。そして、私が人類の息子娘の寿命を延ばすことができれば、それは必ず行う。どんな犠牲を払っても」
languages.original_text: {n}An angry spark zips along the pistons in the Manipulus's beard. He floats higher, turning his lowering gaze on the sector's ceiling.{/n} "Because I cannot abide the senseless waste of potential. I cannot accept that a foolish accident and the fragility of organic flesh can — in an instant — deprive the Imperium of worthy servants. And if I am able extend the service life of the sons and daughters of Humanity, I will do so. Whatever the cost."

traits.locale_text:
怒りの火花がマニピュラスの髭のピストンを駆け巡る。彼は浮上し、セクターの天井を見下ろす。
「私は無意味な潜在能力の無駄を容認できない。愚かな事故と有機物の脆さが一瞬で帝国に値のある臣下を奪うことを受け入れることはできない。そして、私が人類の息子娘の寿命を延ばすことができれば、それは必ず行う。どんな犠牲を払っても。」

languages.text: {n}一道愤怒的火花从操纵者胡须的活塞间窜过。他浮得更高了，愤怒的目光投向舱区的穹顶。{/n}“因我无法容忍对潜能的无谓浪费。仅仅因为一场愚蠢的意外，外加有机血肉本身的脆弱，便能在瞬间从帝国手中夺走一名宝贵的仆从——这种事我无法接受。只要我能够延长他们的服役寿命，我就一定会去做。不惜一切代价。”
languages.original_text: {n}An angry spark zips along the pistons in the Manipulus's beard. He floats higher, turning his glowering gaze on the sector's ceiling.{/n} "Because I cannot abide the senseless waste of potential. I cannot accept that a foolish accident and the fragility of organic flesh can — in an instant — deprive the Imperium of worthy servants. And if I am able to extend their service life, I will do so. Whatever the cost."

languages.text: {n}Una chispa furiosa recorre los pistones de la barba del manipulus. Asciende aún más, llevando su mirada fulminante hacia el techo del sector.{/n} «Porque no puedo tolerar el desperdicio innecesario de potencial. No puedo aceptar que un necio accidente y la fragilidad de la carne orgánica puedan arrebatar sirvientes dignos al Imperium en un instante. Si puedo extender su servicio, lo haré. Cueste lo que cueste».
languages.original_text: {n}An angry spark zips along the pistons in the Manipulus's beard. He floats higher, turning his glowering gaze on the sector's ceiling.{/n} "Because I cannot abide the senseless waste of potential. I cannot accept that a foolish accident and the fragility of organic flesh can — in an instant — deprive the Imperium of worthy servants. And if I am able to extend their service life, I will do so. Whatever the cost."

Asciende aún más, llevando su mirada fulminante hacia el techo del sector.{/n} «Porque no puedo tolerar el desperdicio innecesario de potencial. No puedo aceptar que un necio accidente y la fragilidad de la carne orgánica puedan arrebatar sirvientes dignos al Imperium en un instante. Si puedo extender su servicio, lo haré. Cueste lo que cueste».

languages.text: {n}Ein wütender Funke knistert an den Kolben im Bart des Manipulus. Er schwebt höher und richtet seinen Blick an die Decke des Sektors.{/n} "Weil ich die sinnlose Vergeudung von Potenzial nicht ertrage. Ich kann nicht akzeptieren, dass ein alberner Unfall und die Zerbrechlichkeit von organischem Fleisch dem Imperium von einer Sekunde auf die andere würdige Diener raubt. Und wenn ich ihr Dienstleben verlängern kann, dann tue ich das. Koste es, was es wolle."
languages.original_text: {n}An angry spark zips along the pistons in the Manipulus's beard. He floats higher, turning his glowering gaze on the sector's ceiling.{/n} "Because I cannot abide the senseless waste of potential. I cannot accept that a foolish accident and the fragility of organic flesh can — in an instant — deprive the Imperium of worthy servants. And if I am able to extend their service life, I will do so. Whatever the cost."

Er schwebt höher und richtet seinen Blick an die Decke des Sektors.{/n} "Weil ich die sinnlose Vergeudung von Potenzial nicht ertrage. Ich kann nicht akzeptieren, dass ein alberner Unfall und die Zerbrechlichkeit von organischem Fleisch dem Imperium von einer Sekunde auf die andere würdige Diener raubt. Und wenn ich ihr Dienstleben verlängern kann, dann tue ich das. Koste es, was es wolle."

languages.text: {n}Une étincelle de colère court le long des pistons dans la barbe du manipulus. Il prend de la hauteur et lève un regard rageur vers le plafond du secteur.{/n} « Parce que je ne peux tolérer cet absurde gâchis de potentiel. Je refuse d'accepter qu'un accident stupide et la fragilité de la chair organique puissent, en un instant, priver l'Imperium de serviteurs exemplaires. Et si je suis en mesure de prolonger leur service, je le ferai. Quoi qu'il en coûte. »
languages.original_text: {n}An angry spark zips along the pistons in the Manipulus's beard. He floats higher, turning his glowering gaze on the sector's ceiling.{/n} "Because I cannot abide the senseless waste of potential. I cannot accept that a foolish accident and the fragility of organic flesh can — in an instant — deprive the Imperium of worthy servants. And if I am able to extend their service life, I will do so. Whatever the cost."

languages.text: {n}Manipülus'un sakalındaki pistonlarda öfkeli bir kıvılcım çakıyor. Alçalan bakışlarını sektörün tavanına çevirerek yukarıya yükseliyor.{/n} "Çünkü potansiyelin anlamsızca israf edilmesine tahammül edemiyorum. Aptalca bir kazanın ve organik etin kırılganlığının... Bir anda İmparatorluk'u değerli hizmetkârlardan mahrum bırakabiliyor oluşunu kabullenemiyorum. Eğer hizmet ömürlerini uzatma şansım varsa bunu yapacağım. Her türlü bedeli ödemeye hazırım."
languages.original_text: {n}An angry spark zips along the pistons in the Manipulus's beard. Whatever the cost."
